creator: ume@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202516
Patch to upgrade x11/terminator to 1.0

Here is a patch to upgrade x11/terminator to Terminator 1.0.
It seems 1.0 is the latest version of Terminator which uses GTK2.
The latest Terminator is 1.91.  It is better to upgrade x11/terminator
to the latest one.  However, since it has been moved to use GTK3, it
seems not easy to upgrade to 1.91.
